title: hiptage benghalensis var. tonkinensis
intro: Hiptage benghalensis var. tonkinensis, also known as the Roxburgh's figwort or bael, is a plant species that belongs to the Malpighiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Hiptage benghalensis var. tonkinensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit cardioprotective effects. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
